§6Survival Essentials: Starting Kit§f

§aYour survival journey begins with a few helpful items!§f
Entering a new, hostile world can be incredibly dangerous. To give you a fighting chance against early threats and hunger, you have been equipped with a basic starting kit.

§6Starting Inventory§f:
§b• Offhand Shield§f: A sturdy §9Shield§f is equipped in your offhand slot. Use it to block incoming arrows, skeleton shots, and monster attacks.
§b• Rations§f: You start with §c9× Bread§f in your hotbar to keep your hunger bar full while you search for a suitable base location.

§eTip§f: Use your shield to fend off hostile mobs while knapping flint shards and gathering fiber to craft your first primitive tools.
